pointwise_reference.note: Values from independent Python molden-basis evaluator. Use for bit-accurate C++ cross-check.

v_H.source: psi4.MintsHelper.electrostatic_potential_value (negated); uses libint analytic <mu|1/|r-P||nu> integrals contracted with density matrix D.

polarizability.note: Gas-phase static dipole polarizability (atomic units, a0^3). Computed by analytic CPHF (coupled-perturbed HF/KS) linear response via psi4.properties(method, properties=['DIPOLE_POLARIZABILITIES']). Fully symmetry-preserving -- no external field is ever applied to the Hamiltonian. The main SCF producing the molden file is not affected by this step.
